title: Crispy Chicken Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African-inspired dish with crispy chicken and a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer, covered, until cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro (if desired).
Serve over couscous or rice, if desired.
Garnish with toasted almonds or pine nuts (if desired).
